// Numbersmith: Reading order: every // key is documentation; real settings follow in the same order. MaxLevel, Formulas (each entry: // PatchType, // Enabled, // Formula then values), Verbose, optional EmpyreanEchoes-style toggles.
// MaxLevel: Maximum character level Numbersmith uses when overriding ACE's XP curve. Does not change other mods' caps.
// Formulas: Per-patch AngouriMath overrides. Each object: // keys first, then PatchType, Enabled, Formula. Variable names are documented in each patch class.

Formulas.// PatchType: Harmony patch class name under Numbersmith.Patches (e.g. ArmorMod). Must match a real AngouriMathPatch subclass.
Formulas.// Enabled: When false, this formula patch is not registered at startup.
Formulas.// Formula: AngouriMath expression; empty string uses the patch class default Formula after load.

// Verbose: When true, logs which patches loaded and which formulas are active.
// EnableLifeMagicElementalMod: Originally EmpyreanEchoes; Harmony categories still use these class names.
// EnableDamageOverTimeConversion: EmpyreanEchoes-style DoT conversion behavior when supported by patches.
